lib.title: Library
lib.description: Shared TypeScript library — handles chart generation, SVG rendering, parameter parsing, and theming. Published on npm.

api.title: API
api.description: A deployable API that generates an embeddable SVG chart of your GitHub top languages with themes, custom colours, and caching for READMEs and portfolios.

demo.title: Demo Website
demo.description: Interactive sandbox for testing and previewing chart configurations.
